title: Haze PvP Pack
description: A simple 16x purple PvP texture pack.
body:
# 💜 Haze PvP Pack - V1.6 Update!

![Haze PvP Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LmpGF0mq/images/ff7765f7a5350762d21aa8d47eec4850e86d9365.png)


# 📃 Overview
Haze PvP is a PvP resource pack that gives your weapons, armor, and GUI a sleek and simple makeover. Most notably, anything diamond has been updated to be purple. Check out the gallery [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/haze-pvp/gallery).

# ➕ Changes / Additions

- Swords
- Tools
- Armor Sets
- GUI
- Resources
- Bow
- Lower Shield
- Totem of Undying
- End Crystals
- Respawn Anchors
- Critical Hit Particles
- Removed Explosion Particles
- Golden Foods
- Ender Pearls
- Wool ([VanillaTweaks](https://www.vanillatweaks.net))
- And More!

# 📦 Other Packs
You can find my other projects on my [profile](https://modrinth.com/user/TheMaster223).
